beta.banner: 🚧 Immotrim is currently in beta – we're improving it constantly. Your feedback is very welcome!

hero.eyebrow: Smart property analysis for private investors
hero.title: Documents in. Returns understood.
hero.subtitle: Upload listings and property documents. We automatically detect all the relevant data and show you cash flow, rental yield, amortization and equity return at a glance.

features.title: From PDF to finished analysis
features.subtitle: No spreadsheets, no retyping. Upload your documents — Immotrim does the rest.
features.f1Desc: Upload listings, purchase papers or statements. Our AI reads out purchase price, rent, living area, running costs and more automatically — in seconds, not hours.
features.f2Desc: Every detected value appears in a clear review panel. Correct individual fields with a single click before the calculation runs — full transparency, no black box.
features.f3Desc: Cash flow, amortization, rental yield and equity return are calculated automatically — clearly presented and visualized at a glance.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Caspar – Founder of Immotrim
about.p1: I've been investing in property in Berlin since 2023, with one goal: building a portfolio that lets me reach financial freedom. I come from stock investing, and what I always missed with real estate was a simple way to track my progress, stay motivated and never lose the overview.
about.p2: I run several strategies at once — furnished short-term lets, room-by-room (WG) renting and classic long-term rentals. I wanted to see at a glance which property performs how well, without guessing every time.
about.p3: As the father of a one-year-old daughter, I hated the part of acquisition where I had to type every single number into Excel by hand. With my developer background, I built Immotrim for myself first: paste in the listing, done — and get more time with my family.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: One plan. Pay monthly, or save with yearly billing.
pricing.yearlyDesc: Two months free vs. monthly billing.
pricing.f1: Up to 5 properties in your portfolio
pricing.f2: Up to 50 properties in property analysis
pricing.f3: Unlimited document analysis with Gemini 2.5 Flash
